name: Patrick
note: Embedded in PRELIMINARY_REPORT_SYSTEM_PROMPT as a few-shot exemplar — NOT a generalization test. Use only as a sanity/regression check.

entries.situation: Paramedics checked him out, told him he was fine.
entries.child_behavior_observed: P immediately calmed down completely and told me we could depart.
entries.parent_response: I told him; "see, you are fine."

entries.child_behavior_observed: Patrick stopped crying. He also stopped hyperventilating.
entries.parent_response: I told him paramedics were on the way.

entries.situation: Woke up and came into my room.
entries.child_behavior_observed: P said he was still seeing circles and said he was scared something serious was wrong with him.
entries.parent_response: I took him to an Opthamologist who told us to wait and that things should be fine with time

entries.situation: P had hit his head and had a minor concussion-Dr. said. P woke in the morning complaining that he was seeing circles.
entries.child_behavior_observed: He said something was really wrong and that he needed to go to the doctor
entries.parent_response: I took him to the neurologist, held his hand and reassured him that everything would be ok.

entries.situation: P went outside to play with the dog
entries.child_behavior_observed: P came back into the house immediately. He told me he did not want to be alone and that I needed to stay with him-right next to him.
entries.parent_response: I sat with him in the family room for the rest of the day

entries.child_behavior_observed: P put on his shirt and complained that it was too baggy and didn't fit properly. Requested another shirt (that was actually too small)
entries.parent_response: Got him a smaller shirt and started to have his clothing tailored.

entries.child_behavior_observed: P made a bad shot that hit a tree. He became angry and started to cry. He wouldn't talk to me or anyone else for rest of game
entries.parent_response: I reassured him. Told him everyone misses shots sometimes and promised to get him a few golf lessons.

entries.situation: P had suffered from heat exhaustion earlier in the day and dry heaved.
entries.child_behavior_observed: P became panicked and told me he thought he was very sick and needed to go to the doctor right away
entries.parent_response: took P to the doctor who told P he was OK and to hydrate and rest.

entries.situation: on private plane. doors closed. taxiing for @ 40 seconds.
entries.child_behavior_observed: Patrick cried, said he could not breathe and did not feel O.K. He demanded that plane had to turn back.
entries.parent_response: Asked that plane be brought back to gate and asked for paramedics to check out Patrick
